headline: E-Government Services Cover Only 45% of Citizen Interactions
context: Despite RM4.2 billion investment only 45% of government-citizen interactions available through digital channels in 2025.

cards.big: Only 45% of government services available digitally despite RM4.2 billion
cards.sub: Legacy systems interagency silos and paper requirements block transformation

cards.big: 458 services online but 562 still require in-person visits
cards.sub: 12 major services including land transfers remain paper-based

cards.big: Average government website uptime 94% versus 99.9% for Singapore
cards.sub: Downtime costs 4.5 million lost hours annually in failed transactions

cards.big: Cross-agency data sharing covers only 28 of 78 federal agencies
cards.sub: Citizens submit same information to multiple agencies for many processes

cards.big: E-government gaps test whether digital transformation reaches beyond the easy services
45% e-government coverage. Digitising services without digitising the bureaucracy behind them saves nobody time.
